title: Cryptography and Network Security
author: William Stallings
description: For courses in Cryptography, Computer Security, and Network Security The Principles and Practice of Cryptography and Network Security Stallings’ Cryptography and Network Security introduces students to the compelling and evolving field of cryptography and network security. In an age of viruses and hackers, electronic eavesdropping, and electronic fraud on a global scale, security is paramount. The purpose of this book is to provide a practical survey of both the principles and practice of crypto...
